name: Brownie Tarts
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: TASTE OF HOME - OCT/NOV 95
1. In a mixing bowl, cream the butter and cream cheese until smooth.
2. Add flour; mix well.
3. Chill mixture for 1 hour to firm up.
4. Shape into 1-inch balls.
5. Place in ungreased miniature muffin cups.
6. Press into the bottom and up the sides of each cup to form a shell.
7. For filling: Melt chocolate chips and butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
8. Remove from the heat; stir in sugar, egg, and vanilla extract until smooth.
9. Add chopped pecans if desired.
10. Spoon filling into shells.
11. Bake at 325°F for 30-35 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted into the center comes out clean with a few crumbs.
12. Cool for 10 minutes before removing from the pan to a wire rack.
13. Garnish with cherry halves, if desired.
